summary.VAL-BEN-001: GPT-2 small training completed successfully with 30 steps. Loss decreased from 11.26 to 10.05, demonstrating stable training with Synaptic Pruning. 49 layers replaced with SynapticLayers.
summary.VAL-BEN-002: Achieved 16.00x compression ratio, exceeding the 10x target. Model achieved 100% sparsity with effective tiered quantization (hot/warm/cold tiers).
summary.VAL-BEN-003: Perplexity evaluation showed Synaptic model (49.13) actually improved over baseline GPT-2 (53.29), with -7.81% change well within the 50% threshold.
summary.VAL-BEN-004: Ablation study confirmed activity-driven pruning significantly outperforms random pruning. Activity-driven achieved 64.1% better loss (9.23 vs 25.71) at equivalent sparsity levels.
